# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
Description: A custom user authentication plugin with password hashing
Version: 1.0
*/

class CustomUserAuth {
    private $table_name;
    
    public function __construct() {
        global $wpdb;
        $this->table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'custom_users';
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_register_user', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_register_user', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_login_user', array($this, 'handle_login'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_login_user', array($this, 'handle_login'));
    }
    
    public function init() {
        $this->create_table();
    }
    
    private function create_table() {
        global $wpdb;
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $this->table_name (
            id mediumint(9) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            username varchar(50) NOT NULL,
            email varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            password varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            created_at datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY username (username),
            UNIQUE KEY email (email)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
        wp_enqueue_script('custom-auth', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'assets/js/auth.js', array('jquery'), '1.0', true);
        wp_localize_script('custom-auth', 'ajax_object', array('ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php')));
    }
    
    public function handle_registration() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $username = sanitize_user($_POST['username']);
        $email = sanitize_email($_POST['email']);
        $password = $_POST['password'];
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($email) || empty($password)) {
            wp_send_json_error('All fields are required');
            return;
        }
        
        if (!is_email($email)) {
            wp_send_json_error('Invalid email format');
            return;
        }
        
        if (strlen($password) < 6) {
            wp_send_json_error('Password must be at least 6 characters');
            return;
        }
        
        $existing_user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM $this->table_name WHERE username = %s OR email = %s", $username, $email));
        
        if ($existing_user) {
            wp_send_json_error('Username or email already exists');
            return;
        }
        
        $hashed_password = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert(
            $this->table_name,
            array(
                'username' => $username,
                'email' => $email,
                'password' => $hashed_password
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s')
        );
        
        if ($result !== false) {
            wp_send_json_success('User registered successfully');
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error('Registration failed');
        }
    }
    
    public function handle_login() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $username = sanitize_user($_POST['username']);
        $password = $_POST['password'];
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($password)) {
            wp_send_json_error('Username and password are required');
            return;
        }
        
        $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM $this->table_name WHERE username = %s", $username));
        
        if ($user && password_verify($password, $user->password)) {
            session_start();
            $_SESSION['user_id'] = $user->id;
            $_SESSION['username'] = $user->username;
            wp_send_json_success('Login successful');
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error('Invalid username or password');
        }
    }
}

new CustomUserAuth();
?>
